title: Collision Events, Single Resolution, Fragments, Damage, and Lives · Runtime Lens: Detection Response
summary: One projectile damages the same rock twice, both loops delete the same sprite, fragments recursively collide during creation, ship damage repeats every frame, and feedback arrives after state removal. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the detection response increment in ordered single-resolution collision response. Learners progress through…
objectives: Separate collision facts from response decisions so detection stays pure and effects occur in an owned phase.
Test segment or swept motion and toroidal images for fast movement and edge crossings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-collision-response-damage-2
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-collision-response-damage-2.
# Case 7417: a headless continuous-integration replay.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state.
def worked_asteroids_collision_response_damage_2(collisions: int = 3, resolved_once: int = 3, invulnerability_ms: int = 1200, duplicate_damage: int = 0, fragments_spawned: int = 6) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "playerworked2",
        "seed7417",
        "input2dekrow",
        "frameworked27417",
        "state7417worked2",
        "playtest2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if collisions < 0 or resolved_once < 0:
        return False, collisions, "response-domain"
    if resolved_once != collisions:
        return False, resolved_once, "response-count"
    if invulnerability_ms < 0 or duplicate_damage > 0:
        return False, duplicate_damage, "damage-window"
    if fragments_spawned < collisions:
        return False, fragments_spawned, "fragment-policy"
    assert resolved_once == collisions
    return True, fragments_spawned, "single-response"

steps.instruction:

Build deterministic Python evidence to resolve each collision once with explicit destruction, fragments, lives, invulnerability, feedback, and event ordering; keep browser work pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of native display, device, audio, file, package, and operating-system effects; then cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Separate collision facts from response decisions so detection stays pure and effects occur in an owned phase.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Separate collision facts from response decisions so detection stays pure and effects occur in an owned phase.

Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates.
